data.title: Coloplast A/S - H1 2025/26 Earnings Release - Invitation for conference call on 12 May 2026 at 11:00 CEST
data.description: On Tuesday, 12 May 2026 from 11:00 to 12:00 CEST, Coloplast will conduct a conference call regarding their interim financial results for H1 2025/26. The results will be disclosed around 07:30 CEST on the same day. The call aims to present the financial figures and address queries from investors and analysts. A presentation will be uploaded on Coloplast’s website roughly 1 hour before the call. The webcast of the conference will be accessible both during and after the event.

data.title: BROAD ARROW AUCTIONS SETS NEW BENCHMARK FOR GORDON MURRAY AUTOMOTIVE T.50 WITH $8.035 MILLION RESULT ON THE CALIFORNIA MILLE
data.description: A recent special single-car live auction held at the Allegretto Vineyard Resort set a new world record price for a 2025 GMA T.50, specifically number 009, fetching a staggering $8,035,000. This auction occurred during a stop on the renowned California Mille rally in Paso Robles, California, with the winning bid placed by an attendee in the room. A generous portion of the proceeds from the sale of this rare supercar will go towards supporting the California Highway Patrol 11-99 Foundation and McPherson College. For more information on this auction result and to stay informed about upcoming Broad Arrow auctions, visit broadarrowauctions.com.

data.title: Société Générale Expands Crypto Client Base To Capitalize On Stablecoin Boom
data.description: Société Générale, a French banking giant, is expanding its crypto client base through its digital asset subsidiary, Société Générale-FORGE (SG-Forge), in anticipation of an increase in stablecoin adoption. Currently, the bank caters to approximately 15 crypto-focused firms, such as exchanges, brokers, and wallet providers. It has begun offering traditional banking services to crypto-native companies as Europe's regulatory framework evolves. CEO Jean-Marc Stenger mentioned that the bank foresees a rise in corporate usage of stablecoins, even though the current adoption rate is limited. Stablecoins are primarily utilized for trading purposes.

data.title: What's Going On With Philip Morris Stock Today?
data.description: Philip Morris International Inc (NYSE: PM) saw a stock increase following the release of its quarterly report, showing better-than-expected results fueled by growth in its smoke-free sector and improved margins. The company noted minimal impact from Middle East tensions and adjusted its full-year forecast due to increased input and transport expenses. In the first quarter, adjusted earnings per share were $1.96, surpassing the anticipated $1.83. Quarterly sales reached $10.146 billion, marking a 9.1% increase year over year, exceeding the expected $9.907 billion. The smoke-free business contributed 43% to total net revenues, a 1.3pp rise.

data.title: AFFIRM FILMS ANNOUNCES REMAKE OF THE KENDRICK BROTHERS' BELOVED FILM FLYWHEEL TO RELEASE IN THEATERS OCTOBER 2026
data.description: A tale of transformation unfolds in the upcoming film Flywheel: Ignition, as a used-car salesman undergoes a radical shift towards integrity. Set against the backdrop of Rio de Janeiro, this inspiring story captivates audiences with its powerful message. Sony Pictures' AFFIRM Films has revealed the release date of the drama, scheduled for April 22, 2026, in Culver City, California. Don't miss this compelling narrative of change and redemption.

data.title: FinTech Pet Care Company Kennel Connection Announces Exclusive Diagnostic Partnership with Petwealth, Bringing Clinical-Grade Pet Health Screening to Pet Care Facilities Nationwide
data.description: A partnership has been established between Kennel Connection and Petwealth to introduce clinical-grade PCR pet health screening to pet care facilities across the country. The collaboration aims to provide advanced health screening services to pets in facilities nationwide.

data.title: JEDEC® Previews LPDDR6 Roadmap Expanding LPDDR into Data Centers and Processing-in-Memory
data.description: A preview of new features for the upcoming version of the JESD209‑6 LPDDR6 standard was announced by JEDEC Solid State Technology Association in Arlington, Virginia. The global leader in microelectronics industry standards, JEDEC revealed plans for enhancements to the standard originally published in July 2025. The JC‑42.6 Subcommittee is focused on expanding LPDDR6 capabilities beyond mobile platforms. This move aims to incorporate selected data support, building on the foundation of the previous standard.

data.title: Report: In the S&P 500, Disclosure of AI Risks Surges from 12% to 83%
data.description: In the period between 2023 and 2025, the proportion of S&P 500 firms reporting AI as a potential risk saw a significant increase from 12% to 83%. This noteworthy surge in AI-related risks has brought to light a deficiency in the readiness of corporate boards. Despite efforts to enhance their overall technology supervision, a substantial number of boards appear to be lacking in preparedness for addressing AI challenges.

data.title: Fannie Mae Announces Credit Score Model Updates to Advance Credit Score Modernization
data.description: In an effort to enhance competition and innovation in the credit scoring industry, Fannie Mae revealed plans to incorporate VantageScore® 4.0 into its Selling Guide. This update is set to rollout soon and aims to provide new credit score options to consumers. The move comes as part of the company's strategy to maintain an operational edge while diversifying its offerings. The decision was disclosed by Fannie Mae in Washington on April 22, 2026. The implementation of VantageScore® 4.0 signifies a shift towards incorporating more diverse credit assessment methodologies into the market. This move is expected to shake up the industry and open up new opportunities for both lenders and borrowers. Fannie Mae's decision underscores a commitment to staying at the forefront of the industry, embracing change, and fostering competition.

data.title: SLO County Airport and ForeFront Power Celebrate Earth Day with 100% Solar-Powered Airport
data.description: In San Luis Obispo, California, the San Luis Obispo County Airport (SBP) and ForeFront Power marked Earth Day with a Solar Ribbon Cutting & Sustainability Showcase. The event gathered elected officials, airport and County staff, project partners, and community members to highlight the Airport's new on-site solar parking canopy system generating 907-kilowatt DC. Attendees also learned how this project and the wider Sustainability & Decarbonization Plan are transforming airport operations.

data.title: Avangrid Foundation Supports Trust for Public Land
data.description: Avangrid, based in New Haven, Connecticut, has revealed their generous contribution of a $100,000 grant to the Trust for Public Land. This funding will aid in initiatives aimed at safeguarding parks and public lands while also working towards enhancing accessibility to nature for the community.
